expert_rss.title: A Historic First: Marine Corps Reserve Integrates Multidomain Assets During Exercise
expert_rss.summary: The Marine Corps Reserve is actively deploying multidomain collection assets during an integration course for the first time in its history, marking a technological milestone that ensures the service remains an agile force prepared to dominate in complex, data-driven conflicts.

expert_rss.title: Hegseth: Defense and Fiscal Hawks, Unite!
expert_rss.summary: Urgency, speed, efficiency, competition and lethality are the new guiding principles of the War Department, Secretary of War Pete Hegseth writes. This moment requires defense hawks and fiscal hawks to pull together.

expert_rss.title: NASCAR San Diego Weekend Connects Sailors, Community for Navy 250
expert_rss.summary: Naval Base Coronado welcomed more than 100,000 visitors, race fans, service members, military families and community partners during the inaugural NASCAR San Diego Weekend, which celebrated the service's enduring connection to the American people.

expert_rss.title: Allies Come Together in the Indo-Pacific for Exercise Valiant Shield 26
expert_rss.summary: U.S. Pacific Command joint forces, along with allied and partner forces, kicked off Exercise Valiant Shield 2026 in the Indo-Pacific region to strengthen the joint and combined force through training in precise, lethal and overwhelming scenarios.

expert_rss.title: Ceremony Brings New Name, Transformation to 7th Infantry Division
expert_rss.summary: The 7th Infantry Division (Multi-Domain Command-Pacific) is the Army's newest theater-enabling command, built to integrate maneuver, fires, air defense, cyber, space, electronic warfare, intelligence, unmanned systems, sustainment and command and control to support the joint force across the Pacific.
